Class Post

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.Post
public class Post extends Object
title: Post Class description: represents a single post in the student discussion system a post is either a "Discussion" thread or a "Question" supports full CRUD for posts as required by the student user stories create: Post constructor read: getters - getId, getType, getTitle, getTopic, getAuthor update: setTitle, setTopic delete: handled by PostCollection.deletePost() also includes static validation methods to check input before creating or updating a post
Version:
1.00 2025-11-01
Author:
CSE 360 Group 11

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Post(int id, String type, String title, String topic, String author)
    creates a new Post with all required fields called by PostCollection.loadAllPosts() when reading from the database

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getAuthor()
    Gets the username of the post's author.
    int
    getId()
    Gets the unique database ID of the post.
    String
    getTitle()
    Gets the title or short headline of the post.
    String
    getTopic()
    Gets the full body content of the post.
    String
    getType()
    Gets the type of the post ("Discussion" or "Question").
    static boolean
    isValidAuthor(String author)
    returns true if the author is not null and not blank makes sure every post can be attributed to a user
    static boolean
    isValidTitle(String title)
    returns true if the title is not null and not blank used before creating or saving a post to prevent empty titles
    static boolean
    isValidTopic(String topic)
    returns true if the topic/body is not null and not blank used before creating or saving a post to prevent empty content
    static boolean
    isValidType(String type)
    returns true only if type is "Discussion" or "Question" anything else would break the database routing in PostCollection
    void
    setTitle(String title)
    Sets a new title for the post.
    void
    setTopic(String topic)
    Sets new body content for the post.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Post

      public Post(int id, String type, String title, String topic, String author)
      creates a new Post with all required fields called by PostCollection.loadAllPosts() when reading from the database
      Parameters:
      id - unique integer ID from the database
      type - "Discussion" or "Question"
      title - short headline for the post
      topic - full body content of the post
      author - username of the post creator

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Gets the unique database ID of the post.
      Returns:
      The integer ID.

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Gets the type of the post ("Discussion" or "Question").
      Returns:
      The type of the post.

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Gets the title or short headline of the post.
      Returns:
      The post title.

    • getTopic

      public String getTopic()
      Gets the full body content of the post.
      Returns:
      The post topic/content.

    • getAuthor

      public String getAuthor()
      Gets the username of the post's author.
      Returns:
      The author's username.

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Sets a new title for the post.
      Parameters:
      title - The new title to set.

    • setTopic

      public void setTopic(String topic)
      Sets new body content for the post.
      Parameters:
      topic - The new topic content to set.

    • isValidTitle

      public static boolean isValidTitle(String title)
      returns true if the title is not null and not blank used before creating or saving a post to prevent empty titles
      Parameters:
      title - the title to check
      Returns:
      true if valid, false otherwise

    • isValidTopic

      public static boolean isValidTopic(String topic)
      returns true if the topic/body is not null and not blank used before creating or saving a post to prevent empty content
      Parameters:
      topic - the topic to check
      Returns:
      true if valid, false otherwise

    • isValidAuthor

      public static boolean isValidAuthor(String author)
      returns true if the author is not null and not blank makes sure every post can be attributed to a user
      Parameters:
      author - the author username to check
      Returns:
      true if valid, false otherwise

    • isValidType

      public static boolean isValidType(String type)
      returns true only if type is "Discussion" or "Question" anything else would break the database routing in PostCollection
      Parameters:
      type - the type string to check
      Returns:
      true if valid, false otherwise
